description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a rectangular plot, surrounded by lush green lawns and mature trees. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large windows and multiple access points. A swimming pool and patio area are situated in the backyard, accompanied by outdoor seating and a small outbuilding or shed. The driveway leads to a covered entrance, and the property is bordered by landscaped greenery. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with accents of gray and touches of darker materials for contrast. The overall layout is open and spacious, emphasizing outdoor living and seamless integration with the garden.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a backyard pool, patio, and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pool, patio furniture, and a portion of the main building with trees on both sides.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, main entrance, and the landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pool, outbuilding, and the rear lawn area with more trees.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backyard, pool, patio, and dense tree coverage at the back.
